case_title: MILTON MIRANDA VS. MARCELO RICARDO CAIXETA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, MILTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAIXETA, MARCELO RICARDO $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
